zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Knightley於1344年出生在英國斯塔福爾格諾薩爾時，他的父親Robert Knightley29歲，母親Juliana29歲。他去世於1414年在他的家鄉享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Knightley于1344年出生在英国斯塔福爾格諾薩爾时，他的父亲Robert Knightley29岁，母亲Juliana29岁。他去世于1414年在他的家乡享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰斯塔福爾格諾薩爾。

nameMeanings.name: Knightley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Knightly
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of Knightley, a habitational name from Knightley in Gnosall (Staffordshire). The placename derives from Old English cniht ‘knight, young man, retainer’ (genitive plural cnihta) + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. This is the usual spelling of the name in Ireland, where it has been establishes since the 17th century.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Knightley was born in 1344, in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, his father, Robert Knightley, was 29 and his mother, Juliana, was 29. He died in 1414, in his hometown, at the age of 70, and was buried in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Knightley est né en 1344, à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert Knightley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Juliana, avait 29 ans. Il est décédé en 1414, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Gnosall, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Knightley 1344 in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert Knightley 29 und seine Mutter Juliana 29. Er starb 1414 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Knightley è nato il nel 1344 nel Gnosall, Staffordshire, England, il suo padre, Robert Knightley, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Juliana, aveva 29 anni. Morì nel 1414, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Knightley(이)가 1344년 영국 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert Knightley(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Juliana(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1414년 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 뇰사에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Knightley родился в 1344 г. в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert Knightley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Juliana, 29. Он умер в 1414 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности гносалл, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Knightley nació en 1344, en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert Knightley, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Juliana, tenía 29 años. Murió en 1414, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Gnosall, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
